data.title: Polymarket teams up with Chainlink to enhance prediction market accuracy, expanding on Polygon with this new partnership.
data.description: Polymarket, a prediction platform leveraging Polygon, has announced a strategic collaboration with Chainlink, a leading decentralized oracle network. This partnership aims to enhance the infrastructure for both platforms. Notably, Polygon has a market cap of over $10 billion, while Chainlink boasts a market cap exceeding $15 billion. This move signifies a significant step in the expansion and development of decentralized prediction markets.

data.title: Cre8 Enterprise Limited wins Gold Award for interactive annual report at the 2025 ARC, notable for work on China Unicom's 2024 report; also received 2024 ARC Grand Award in Cover Design.
data.description: Hong Kong, Sept. 12, 2025 - Cre8 Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: CRE), a financial printing service provider based in Hong Kong, has won the MerComm Annual Report Competition (ARC) 2025 Interactive Annual Report Gold Award for its exceptional work on China Unicom (Hong Kong) Limited’s 2024 annual report. The Company had also previously been honored with the ARC Grand Award in Cover Design for AsiaInfo Technologies Limited’s annual report in 2024. These accolades highlight Cre8's commitment to excellence in financial printing services.

data.title: Hibbett and adidas release "State Fair" Superstar shoe limited to 1,320 pairs, inspired by Texas tradition.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, Hibbett and adidas have collaborated to release the limited-edition “State Fair” Superstar, inspired by the State Fair of Texas. Only 1,320 pairs of this unique design have been created, showcasing a playful Texas-inspired theme. The collaboration aimed to capture the essence and spirit of the State Fair through the creativity of adidas and Hibbett employees. The “State Fair” Superstar is a special edition footwear that pays homage to the flavors and vibe of Texas, offering a distinct and exclusive aesthetic.

data.title: Research report on China Automotive Cockpit Domain Controller predicts 3 architectures by 2025. AI integration increases hardware demands.
data.description: A new report titled "Automotive Cockpit Domain Controller Research Report, 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report delves into the research on cockpit domain controllers, focusing on three different architectures tailored for artificial intelligence. It examines three layout solutions geared towards empowering AI within the cockpit domain controllers. This shift towards AI deep empowerment within intelligent cockpits necessitates advanced hardware products for cockpit domain control to meet the increasing demands, in terms of high-computing capabilities.

data.title: Jack in the Box offers $5 Smashed Jacks for 7 days, costing $35 in total, named "Best Burger in Fast Food."
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box is offering a special deal during Burger Week from September 12-18. Customers can enjoy the popular Smashed Jack burger for only $5 each day, totaling $35 for seven days, both in-store and on the Jack App. The Smashed Jack, hailed as the "Best Burger in Fast Food," was first introduced in 2024 and has become a fan favorite. This promotion allows fans to indulge in seven days of delicious smashed perfection at an affordable price.

data.title: Hain Celestial Group to report EPS of $0.03 on 2025-09-15. Analysts expect company to surpass estimates. Stock trading at $2.12. Neutral rating, $2.5 target price. 74.25% decline in 52-week period.
data.description: Hain Celestial Group (NASDAQ: HAIN) is expected to announce its latest quarterly earnings on September 15, with analysts estimating an EPS of $0.03. Investors are hopeful for positive news that exceeds expectations and provides optimistic guidance for the next quarter, as this can influence stock prices significantly. Analysts have given the company a neutral rating with a one-year price target of $2.5, indicating a potential 17.92% increase. More details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Alabama family finds 32-million-year-old leatherback sea turtle fossil on fishing trip - rare find.
data.description: A family from Alabama stumbled upon a remarkable find during a fishing trip - a fossil of a leatherback sea turtle dating back 32 million years.

data.title: AAVE price jumps to $314.83 (+3.61%) with governance proposal & $3 trillion deposit milestone boosting DeFi dominance.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $314.83, marking a 3.61% increase in the last 24 hours. A governance proposal has been introduced to decrease emissions, with the goal of enhancing the financial stability of the protocol. Additionally, AAVE has reached a significant milestone with $3 trillion in total deposits, further solidifying its position as a dominant force in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector.
